zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Norton於1532年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Norton32歲，母親Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer30歲。他於大約1556年與Alice Cranmer在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1584年3月10日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯特亞特利享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯特亞特利聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Norton于1532年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Norton32岁，母亲Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer30岁。他于大约1556年与Alice Cranmer在英国英格兰貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1584年3月10日在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯特亞特利享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯特亞特利聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Norton was born in 1532, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Thomas Norton, was 32 and his mother, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, was 30. He married Alice Cranmer about 1556, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 March 1584, in Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Norton est né en 1532, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Norton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Cranmer environ 1556, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1584, à Streatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Norton 1532 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Norton 32 und seine Mutter Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer 30. Er hat um 1556 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Cranmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1584 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Norton è nato il nel 1532 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Norton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Cranmer circa 1556, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1584, nel Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Nortonが1532年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Nortonは32歳，母Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimerは30歳であった。約1556年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでAlice Cranmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1584年3月10日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストレアトリーで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストレアトリースト マルガーエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.Sharpenhoe Manor, Sharpenhoe, Streatley,: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.Sharpenhoe, Central Bedfordshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.Church of Saint Margaret, Streatley, Cen: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 스트 마가트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Norton(이)가 1532년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Norton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Alice Cranmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1584년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Norton nasceu em 1532, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Norton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Cranmer aproximadamente 1556, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1584, em Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Norton родился в 1532 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Norton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Cranmer около 1556 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 марта 1584 г. в местности стритли, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, стритли, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Norton nació en 1532, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Norton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Martha Elizabeth Merry Viscountess Latimer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice Cranmer aproximadamente 1556, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1584, en Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en St Margaret's Church, Streatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
